text: Upon entering this glass box of discovery and innovation, I feel surrounded by human curiosity made manifest. The atmosphere is clinical yet inviting, dominated by the promise of research and development—R+D—as if this space exists precisely for questioning reality. It is a place where wonder mixes with unease, as I reflect on the interplay between the observer and the observed, between creator and the created. Am I here to witness the future, or to become part of the experiment myself? I feel both anticipation and a tinge of alienation in this bright, sterile enclosure of ideas.
